public_evidence_used: EIA-860M operating unit with scheduled-retirement exposure in the candidate screen.
not_assumed: No claim that a specific unit will be relicensed, financed or retained; economic-retirement context is represented only through the scheduled-retirement counterfactual.
sensitivity_treatment: Low/high sensitivity scales retention rho by 0.75/1.25, capped at 1.

public_evidence_used: Non-operating restart candidate in the project-status screen, with capacity and availability year retained in the unit ledger.
not_assumed: No forecast of NRC approval, financing, PPA execution or owner delivery; restart uncertainty is screened rather than predicted.
sensitivity_treatment: Low sensitivity applies a 0.50 restart-feasibility haircut; high case is capped at the current rho of 1.
